channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sandra Laville addresses public concerns over England’s water pollution crisis
item.description: Sandra Laville, Guardian environment correspondent, has long investigated England's sewage crisis, revealing the effects of privatisation on the water industry. In a reader Q&A session, she addressed ...

item.title: Court Schedules Defence Hearings for Former Khana LG Chairman and Co-Accused in Cult-Related Murder Case
item.description: The Rivers State High Court has adjourned the high-profile cult-related murder trial involving the former Caretaker Committee Chairman of Khana Local Government Area, Sunny Bekanwa, and his co-accused...

item.title: De La Salle Lady Spikers Secure Final Four Berth with Hard-Fought Win Over FEU
item.description: The De La Salle Lady Spikers secured their place in the UAAP Season 88 Final Four after a nail-biting five-set victory over the FEU Lady Tamaraws. The match, a true display of grit and determination f...

item.title: Adelaide Avenue Crash Causes Lane Closures in Deakin
item.description: A crash involving a cyclist and a motorbike rider has prompted police to close southbound lanes on Adelaide Avenue in Deakin, Canberra. The incident occurred near the Kent Street off-ramp and was repo...

item.title: High School Basketball Stars Navigate Fame, NIL Deals, and Pressure
item.description: King Bacot, a 15-year-old freshman at Petersburg High School in Virginia, is one of the top-ranked players in the high school class of 2029. Already immersed in a professional-style basketball environ...

item.title: African nations urged to invest more in science and health systems to strengthen healthcare for all
item.description: During the commemoration of World Health Day held on April 7, 2026, in Dar es Salaam, the Ministry of Health joined hands with the World Health Organization (WHO), the National Institute for Medical R...

item.title: KSE-100 Index Sees Record Surge Following US-Iran Ceasefire Announcement
item.description: On Wednesday, the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) witnessed a historic surge as the benchmark KSE-100 index jumped by nearly 14,000 points during intraday trade. Investors across the country reacted pos...

item.title: John Howard defends Ben Roberts-Smith's right to presumption of innocence after arrest
item.description: Former Prime Minister John Howard has voiced support for Ben Roberts-Smith, following the latter’s arrest at Sydney Airport on Tuesday. Roberts-Smith, Australia's most decorated living soldier, faces ...

item.title: Pretoria Police Sergeant Faces Charges Over Improperly Held Case Files
item.description: A Pretoria-based police sergeant, Fannie Nkosi, is facing serious allegations after it was discovered he had a collection of sensitive case files related to various heists and serious crimes stored at...

item.title: Public Trustee Services Now Available Online in Kenya Through e-Citizen
item.description: The Attorney General’s office has made a significant move towards modernizing government services by launching online Public Trustee services on the e-Citizen platform. This initiative, effective imme...

item.title: Plateau Lawmaker Identifies Attackers, Calls for Transparency in Investigation
item.description: As e dey hot, oga Dickson Chollom, wey be the Lawmaker for Barkin Ladi area for Plateau State, don talk say dem no go again use the phrase 'unknown gunmen' to describe the recent wahala wey dey happen...

item.title: Cotabato City Police arrest six suspected shabu dealers in coordinated operations
item.description: COTABATO CITY, Philippines — In a coordinated law enforcement effort, six suspected shabu dealers were arrested in four separate operations within Cotabato City in less than 24 hours. The arrests came...

item.title: Pakistan’s diplomatic role in brokering the US–Iran ceasefire
item.description: The article explains how Pakistan, under Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar, quietly but actively positioned itself as a central mediator between th...

item.title: Tuju Faces Charges for Falsely Claiming Abduction
item.description: Raphael Tuju, the former Cabinet Secretary in Kenya, has been charged with giving false information to the police after allegedly staging his disappearance in March 2026. Tuju appeared before the Kibe...

item.title: Women Lead Health Workforce in Lamu, Transforming Local Healthcare
item.description: In Lamu County, a historically conservative region in Kenya, women now make up 53.9 percent of the health workforce, according to the 2026 County Medical Services Workforce Report. Female doctors, nur...

item.title: Plateau State Attack: 33 Dead, Protest Breaks Out During Funeral
item.description: The attack on Anguwan Rukuba community in Jos North, Plateau State, during Palm Sunday resulted in the deaths of 33 people. Originally, the death toll was 28, but more victims succumbed to their injur...

item.title: Filipino Singers Shine on Britain’s Got Talent 2026
item.description: Filipino artists Matty Juniosa and Kristel Herrera are making waves in the 2026 season of Britain’s Got Talent. Juniosa, known for his powerful rendition of ‘Purple Rain,’ earned the prestigious Golde...

item.title: Rivers State University Celebrates Professor Fakae’s Digital Transformation Legacy at His 70th Birthday
item.description: The Vice Chancellor of Rivers State University (RSU), Professor Isaac Zeb-Obipi, don show strong appreciation for Professor Barimene Fakae, the former Vice Chancellor, for him solid impact on making t...

item.title: Readers Share Quirky Observations and Questions in Column 8
item.description: This Column 8 edition of The Sydney Morning Herald features a light-hearted mix of reader observations, questions, and personal anecdotes. Gary Bryson from Blackheath questions the tone of roadside sp...

item.title: Suspect dies after falling from height while fleeing from police in Taguig
item.description: A man lost his life in Taguig City after jumping from a considerable height while trying to escape police pursuit. According to initial information from authorities, the suspect was being chased by po...
